3146780.name: Supply Chained
3146780.description:
Supply Chained is an open-ended negotiation RPG with strategic shooting mechanics, where you must take down a powerful mafia syndicate harassing your sister—your only remaining family. To succeed, you’ll need to compete directly with the mafia, capture markets to weaken their influence, and broker deals with restaurants and suppliers. Defend against enemy raids, grow your business empire, and ultimately confront the syndicate’s kingpin. Will you secure a peaceful life or seize control of the operation yourself? The choice is yours.

Negotiate through risky deals, where each decision counts towards your success. Rip off or be ripped off by dealers, suppliers & restaurants. Decide and invest in building relations with the people who will further your goals. Careful though cause appearances can be deceiving. Work through unique experiences with individual characters to build a relation or break one.

Deadly shootouts are common in the underworld the hard part is not getting caught, work your way through shootouts without leaving a trace. Navigate through the cut throat world of gangs & supply - chains.

Reputation is everything for a businessman, move through deals & influence your way through the game to reach your goal. Make strategic choices to maintain your influence & avoid unnecessary conflicts. Influence is a powerful thing to have & also gets you to powerful places

Take on the challenge to rise to the the top of the supply chain while maintaining your sanity!
